titles.title: Press on It Won't Be Very Long

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is glory in my soul Since Jesus took control, He placed within my heart A happy song: The joybells sweetly sing, While I Have His love I sing. Press on, It won't be very long.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Press on, it won't be very long, (not long) Until we reach that land of song, In heaven some sweet day, I'm going there to stay. Press on It won't be very long.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He fills my way with cheer, With Him I have no fear, He guides my weary steps Along the way. ; I'm glad He promised me A mansion full and free Press on It won't be very long.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In heaven I am told The streets are purest gold, O, what a lovely place to make my home, United there will be Will shout the victory, Press On it wont be very long.
